overview: A premium multi-step onboarding wizard for the AI Intelligence Financial Layer Vault and Legacy Platform. Features 9 guided steps covering account setup, identity verification, financial profiling, AI preferences, vault and beneficiary configuration, and security setup — all wrapped in a dark, premium financial aesthetic with gold accents and smooth animated transitions.
features: 9-step onboarding wizard with progress bar and step indicators
Account type selection (Individual, Business, Family Trust, Estate/Legacy)
Identity verification with file upload prompt
Financial profile with income, AUM, investment goals, and risk tolerance slider
AI Intelligence preferences with toggles and consent controls
Vault setup with beneficiary configuration and personal legacy message
Security setup with 2FA method selection and 6-digit PIN
Review & Confirm screen with per-section edit navigation
Animated success screen with next steps checklist and Enter Your Vault CTA
Dark premium aesthetic with deep navy, charcoal, and gold/amber accents
Subtle AI-themed neural network background pattern
Mobile-responsive layout with smooth animated step transitions
